issue.title: [Adoption] Legacy analytics repo workflow adoption
issue.body:
## Current repo and workflow state
The repo has active production work, open issues, labels used as workflow states, and no consistent milestone model.

## Pain points
Planning is fragmented across issues, PRs, and chat, and blocked work is hard to see.

## Preferred adoption mode
Assist.

## Active work to prioritize
Current Q2 dashboard reliability milestone and the top ten open issues.

## Constraints
The team does not want closed historical issues rewritten, and the active board must remain usable during migration.

artifact.title: Adoption brief: Legacy analytics repo
artifact.summary: Incremental adoption of the GitHub-native workflow in a live repository.

Current-state summary: Active production work must continue during migration.
Migration scope: Route new work through the orchestrator.
Open questions: Which existing labels should be preserved as stable taxonomy?
Which current board columns map to Status and Readiness?
